name: Low Fat Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together 2 cups sugar and 1 cup applesauce.
2. Add the egg product and mix well.
3. Add vanilla and mashed bananas, then mix until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Sift flour with baking soda, gradually adding to the mixture until everything is fully blended.
5. Bake both loaves at 325°F for about an hour (if cooking both loaves simultaneously, it may take a bit longer).
